---
title: "nitrix.linalg.matrix"
generated: true
signature-hash: d497faf87068061f
description: "Matrix utilities for symmetric matrices, diagonals, and Toeplitz structure."
listing:
  id: nitrix-linalg-matrix-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-linalg-matrix/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.linalg.matrix`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Matrix utilities for symmetric matrices, diagonals, and Toeplitz structure.

A collection of the bread-and-butter primitives used by downstream
consumers that work with covariance and connectivity matrices: symmetric
and antisymmetric views, diagonal masking, Toeplitz construction, and
eigenspace reconditioning for stable differentiation.

The main surfaces are:

- [`symmetric`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/symmetric.qmd) -- symmetrise (or antisymmetrise) any square block.
- [`sym2vec`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/sym2vec.qmd) / [`vec2sym`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/vec2sym.qmd) / [`squareform`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/squareform.qmd) -- bijection
  between symmetric matrices and the vec of their strict upper triangle.
  Both carry hand-rolled `custom_vjp` rules: the backward of
  [`sym2vec`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/sym2vec.qmd) sums diagonal entries' gradients only once, and the
  backward of [`vec2sym`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/vec2sym.qmd) accounts for the symmetrising reflection.
- [`delete_diagonal`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/delete_diagonal.qmd) / [`fill_diagonal`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/fill_diagonal.qmd) -- masked diagonal
  operations.
- [`recondition_eigenspaces`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/recondition_eigenspaces.qmd) -- stabilise differentiation through SVD
  and symmetric eigendecomposition by perturbing zero or near-degenerate
  eigenvalues.
- [`toeplitz`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/toeplitz.qmd) / [`toeplitz_2d`](nitrix-linalg-matrix/toeplitz_2d.qmd) -- Toeplitz construction using a
  vmap-over-roll recipe that is faster than scipy on GPU but degrades on
  TPU.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `i` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `j` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `mc` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-linalg-matrix-symbols}
:::
